meaning: adj.使下降(或降解、陵削、退化等)的 趋向下降(或降解等)的
examples: Microbial degradative process from larch tannin to catechin was studied for the first time.
These results indicated that degradative and transposable genes of the naphthalene-degrading bacteria are highly conserved.
The invention relates to a tobacco straw degradative fungi and a microbial inoculum thereof, belonging to the technical field of the waste resource utilization.
